feed.title: Tim Slifer
feed.subtitle: A minimal, portfolio, sidebar, bootstrap Jekyll theme with responsive web design and focuses on text presentation.

entry.title: Re-launching...
entry.summary: Hi. I’m back. Let’s try this again. If you were one of the handful of people to stop by my old site, you will have noticed it hadn’t been touched in quite some time. I’ve scrapped that site and have started fresh here. I’m still using Jekyll on GitHub Pages. I’ve adopted a new theme this time. I’m quite fond of Chirpy, despite the challenges I’ve encountered with customization. In fact, I’m n...
